title: Monitor Blood Inventory Levels and Alert on Low Stock
description: The system shall monitor blood inventory levels per ABO/Rh type and raise an alert when stock for any blood type falls below 5 units.
rationale: This requirement is necessary to ensure that the blood bank has sufficient stock of all required blood types, preventing potential shortages during emergencies.
business_value: This requirement ensures timely restocking of critical medical supplies, thereby enhancing patient care and reducing the risk of blood supply disruptions.

source.description: As a blood bank manager I need to monitor blood inventory levels per ABO/Rh type and be alerted when stock for any blood type falls below 5 units so that I can notify relevant personnel to initiate restocking procedures.

acceptance_criteria: The system raises an alert when the stock level for any ABO/Rh blood type drops below 5 units.
Relevant personnel are notified to initiate restocking procedures.
preconditions: The blood bank inventory tracking system is active.
functional_constraints: The alert threshold is defined as 5 units for any blood type.
edge_cases: What happens when the inventory level drops below zero?
How does the system handle sudden spikes in demand that could temporarily cause stock to drop below the threshold?
dependencies: Blood bank inventory tracking system must be active and functioning properly.

interfaces.name: Inventory Database
interfaces.description: Interacts with the database to retrieve current blood inventory levels and update stock counts.

interfaces.name: Notification API
interfaces.description: Communicates with the notification system to alert relevant personnel about low stock levels.

test_cases.description: Verify that an alert is raised when the inventory level for a specific blood type drops below 5 units.
test_cases.expected_result: The system raises an alert and sends notifications to relevant personnel.

test_cases.description: Check that the alert threshold is correctly set at 5 units.
test_cases.expected_result: The system does not raise an alert until the inventory level for any blood type drops below 5 units.
